title: Compress Text for Storage with Python
summary: Compress structured text into a base64-encoded gzip string so it uses less space in text-only storage.
verification_notes: Executed from the snippet root with Python 3.9 on macOS. Verified behavior covers JSON text round-trip, empty strings, Unicode text, size reduction for repetitive JSON, invalid base64 errors, invalid gzip payload errors, and non-string input rejection for both functions.
